emails.subject: Re: Comments to Gov's Proposals
emails.body: Re: Comments to Gov's Proposals Thanks. Kari just wrote me an email expressing great appreciation for the materials. I told her that the rest will follow in the next hour. You're about to get from me the details on the buy-down proposal. I don't think that the bankers or the capital markets are going to swallow what Loretta Lynch issued today.
